title: Automated 'email address' for an item
excerpt: Anyone know if I can get the email address to email updates to an item automatically? I’d like to create a zap/make flow to get the email address and create a contact in our shared outlook contacts list with the item nam…

posts.author: silverberrytree (Elise)
posts.cookedHtml: Anyone know if I can get the email address to email updates to an item automatically? I’d like to create a zap/make flow to get the email address and create a contact in our shared outlook contacts list with the item name.

posts.author: BKGDP (Bethany Koch)
posts.cookedHtml:
yes, in make.com you can CC an email like this (the ID being the Pulse ID) just put your particular Monday.com URL part where the Underline is

It would depend on the particular workflow, but you could have things forwarded to this to get it to update the particular item

posts.author: silverberrytree (Elise)
posts.cookedHtml: Fabulous, thank you so much! I’m very new to Make, so I’ll do my best
